title: How do you keep inventory in sync?
text: I run a small Shopify store and manually copy inventory numbers from my supplier spreadsheet every Friday. It takes two hours and I keep making mistakes. Is there a simple tool for this that isn't $200 a month?

title: Comment on Shopify inventory workflow
text: I have the same problem. Every week I export a CSV and update stock by hand. The apps I tried cost more than my store makes some months.

title: Inventory apps for a tiny store?
text: We still use Google Sheets to reconcile supplier stock with Shopify twice a week. Existing inventory platforms are too expensive for our 40 orders a month. What do other tiny stores use?

title: Shopify is cool
text: I think ecommerce is the future. What do you think?
